story.iWant: data migration script and comprehensive tests
story.soThat: existing users transition cleanly to new design
story.tasks: 1. Migration script for existing users 2. Migrate User.role → UserRole junction 3. Backfill default roles for users without roles 4. Data validation after migration 5. Unit tests for all new/changed functionality 6. Integration tests for registration flow 7. E2E tests for permission checking

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Backfill default roles for users without roles
Unit tests for all new/changed functionality

doc.title: Epic 16: Clean Relational Role Design
doc.snippet: Data migration and comprehensive test coverage for clean relational design

doc.title: User Prisma Model
doc.snippet: User model with userRoles relation, NO role field (already migrated)

file.reason: SQL migration to remove role field from User table
Integration tests for registration flow with UserRole

constraints.constraint: Migration must be idempotent (can run multiple times safely)
All existing users must have at least one role after migration
Test database must be separate from production

interface.name: Migration Script
interface.signature: -- Step 1: Backfill UserRole records from User.role -- Step 2: Validate all users have roles -- Step 3: Alter table drop column role -- Step 4: Validate clean state

tests.standards: Jest unit tests, Supertest integration tests, E2E test suite

test.idea: User registration creates user with default role via UserRole
Permission calculation includes roles and direct permissions
Login works with UserRole-based admin check
All users have roles after migration
